scope.target: Integrated v0.5.0 candidate validation, hosted evidence, independent assessment, and release-readiness reconciliation

steps: Run complete deterministic and real-upgrade gates
Retain Windows and hosted Ubuntu evidence
Reconcile every backlog item and final report
Validate commit range and release-ready state
execution.last_completed_step: Candidate commit 073829ff5c947084fc2625893d43fb8d1fd8825f passed the exact local clean-state gate and two byte-identical four-source builds. Hosted candidate run 29878332021 exposed a workflow-only cleanliness defect: release-body rendering wrote into dist before exact-state validation. The output is now routed to RUNNER_TEMP with a regression assertion.
execution.next_action: Commit and push the hosted-workflow correction, require all PR gates to pass, then freeze the resulting candidate revision for independent assessment.

results.summary: Local candidate evidence is complete; hosted candidate verification is being corrected without weakening the clean-source invariant.
results.residual_risk: Hosted rerun and independent assessment are still required. Tag and publication remain separately owner-authorized.
